creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I agree with comment #7.

Maybe it would be a good idea to add a few lines to the Makefile that explain what is needed to build the port by printing a message in the same style than openoffice: for openoffice, before starting the build the message "To build OOo, you  should have a lot of free space (11 GB) and memory (2GB)." is printed.
